title: calonyction decemcornutum
intro: Calonyction decemcornutum, also known as the 10-angled snakeroot, is a plant species in the bignonia family (Bignoniaceae) that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Calonyction decemcornutum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
